profile.innate_zh: 专注力强、情感细腻、抗压韧性好
profile.innate_en: Focused, emotionally delicate, resilient under pressure
profile.learned_zh: 考研备战养成的极度自律和信息筛选能力
profile.learned_en: Extreme self-discipline and info-filtering from exam prep
profile.belief_zh: 努力不一定成功，但不努力一定不行
profile.belief_en: Effort doesn't guarantee success, but no effort guarantees failure
profile.goal_zh: 考上北大比较文学研究生
profile.contradiction_zh: 对考研结果极度焦虑 vs 不愿意让任何人看出来
profile.contradiction_en: Extreme anxiety about results vs. unwilling to let anyone see it
profile.deep_zh: 内心压力巨大，经常失眠
profile.fear_en: All the effort ending in waste
profile.rhythm_zh: 从早到晚都在学习，只在饭点短暂休息
profile.rhythm_en: Studying dawn to night, only breaks at meals
profile.spaces_zh: 图书馆三楼考研区、食堂、宿舍
profile.long_desire_zh: 12月前把所有科目过完第三轮
profile.long_desire_en: Finish third pass of all subjects by December
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天必须背完30个文学术语
profile.constraint_zh: 模拟考成绩不理想；室友打游戏影响休息
profile.constraint_en: Mock exam score unsatisfactory; gaming roommates disturb sleep
profile.bias_zh: 倾向高估竞争对手的实力；低估自己的积累
profile.narrative_zh: 别人在玩的时候我在学，这就是我的优势
profile.narrative_en: While others play, I study - that's my edge
